name: Hoax.ai Non-Public Static Workbench Prototype Location Policy
location_rules: directory must not be created in Sprint 33
future prototype must not be linked from homepage
future prototype must not be linked from public reference pages
future prototype must not be added to sitemap.xml
future prototype must not be registered as active public route
future prototype must remain repository-visible but non-public as a web surface
non_authorization_statement: This location policy defines a future-allowed path only. It does not authorize directory creation, prototype files, public routes, or sitemap entries in Sprint 33.
